Specifically, user refreshing was performed using the primary key instead of the username, leading to a potential security risk if a user is allowed to change their username. The fix in version 1.2.1 addresses this issue by loading the user using the primary key during refreshing.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8wx3-8m4x-g5h4", "github_reviewed_at": "2024-05-15T21:43:23Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8wx3-8m4x-g5h4", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8wx3-8m4x-g5h4"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2024-05-15T21:43:23Z", "references": ["https://github.com/FriendsOfSymfony/FOSUserBundle/commit/5a36e2958068d1e6501dc8cf39bbae3ebb859d9f", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/friendsofsymfony/user-bundle/2012-07-10-1.yaml", "https://github.com/FriendsOfSymfony/FOSUserBundle/blob/master/Changelog.md", "https://github.com/FriendsOfSymfony/FOSUserBundle/commit/1b8bc18e3d99ef0b52b4141f20da323033d6be9b", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8wx3-8m4x-g5h4"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/FriendsOfSymfony/FOSUserBundle", "summary": "FOSUserBundle User Identity Validation Vulnerability", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-16T18:42:41Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8wx3-8m4x-g5h4", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.2.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "friendsofsymfony/user-bundle"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.0.0, < 1.2.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
